objective: Materialize and audit the Wave 51 mixed-hook value-unique support as a 60-row exact metadata shard.
non_negotiables: The shard must remain exact metadata over depth-two local-move thermograph values, not a new ExactValueClass.
The shard must pass schema validation, Astralbase replay, split/leakage validation, and a deterministic result-signature floor before model work.
Wave 52 may be cited as an audited exact shard, but not as learned-model evidence.
Future model claims must use this exact split and report the deterministic floor.

tasks.prompt: Add a distinct mixed-hook exact-shard generator with Wave 52 row IDs and replay-compatible exact metadata.
outputs: Regression test for rpf1 schema validation and Astralbase replay
acceptance: The rpf1 mixed-hook exact shard has 3 exact rows.
Rows replay with zero skipped non-target rows.
The original Wave 47 exact-shard command remains available.

tasks.prompt: Materialize the rpf20 mixed-hook exact shard and validate schema.
acceptance: Schema validation reports labels: ok (60 row(s)).

tasks.prompt: Replay, split/leakage-check, and score deterministic target floors for the mixed-hook exact shard.
acceptance: Replay checks 60 exact rows and skips zero non-target rows.
Leakage validation passes with zero duplicate component/result value digests and zero cross-split digest leakage.
The result_signature_key floor scores train/dev/test 0.0208/0.0/0.0 with all dev/test labels unseen.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 52 as an audited exact-shard milestone and route the next wave toward model baselines on the exact split.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that Wave 52 is an audited exact shard, not model evidence.
Docs require future models to report against the Wave 52 split and deterministic floor.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_52_mixed_hook_exact_shard_audit.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 52 plan is internally consistent.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/label_schema.py validate docs/signature_target_mixed_hook_exact_wave_52.jsonl && python3 engine/ml_model.py validate-report docs/signature_target_mixed_hook_exact_wave_52_split_report.json --fail-on-leakage
integration_gates.success_signal: The mixed-hook exact shard passes schema and leakage gates.
